chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 982 of 2023 [Dr.Samar Raza Talpur vs. PO Sindh & others] Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 09-10-2025 Mr. Ather Ali Mirani, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
